'''rolayaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:stab|stab]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-l-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:stab|stab]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| rolayaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolayithi|rolayithi]] || [[word:rolayiji|rolayiji]] || [[word:rolayishi|rolayishi]] || [[word:rolayiki|rolayiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolayuthuthu|rolayuthuthu]] || [[word:rolayujuju|rolayujuju]] || [[word:rolayushushu|rolayushushu]] || [[word:rolayukuku|rolayukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolayuthu|rolayuthu]] || [[word:rolayuju|rolayuju]] || [[word:rolayushu|rolayushu]] || [[word:rolayuku|rolayuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolayufthuf|rolayufthuf]] || [[word:rolayufjuf|rolayufjuf]] || [[word:rolayufshuf|rolayufshuf]] || [[word:rolayufkuf|rolayufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolayethe|rolayethe]] || [[word:rolayeje|rolayeje]] || [[word:rolayeshe|rolayeshe]] || [[word:rolayeke|rolayeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolayothotho|rolayothotho]] || [[word:rolayojojo|rolayojojo]] || [[word:rolayoshosho|rolayoshosho]] || [[word:rolayokoko|rolayokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolayotho|rolayotho]] || [[word:rolayojo|rolayojo]] || [[word:rolayosho|rolayosho]] || [[word:rolayoko|rolayoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolayofthof|rolayofthof]] || [[word:rolayofjof|rolayofjof]] || [[word:rolayofshof|rolayofshof]] || [[word:rolayofkof|rolayofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfthÃŸf|rolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfjÃŸf|rolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfshÃŸf|rolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfkÃŸf|rolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|rolayÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|rolayÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|rolayÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|rolayÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfthÃŸf|rolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfjÃŸf|rolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfshÃŸf|rolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfkÃŸf|rolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfthÃŸf|rolayÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfjÃŸf|rolayÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfshÃŸf|rolayÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:rolayÃŸfkÃŸf|rolayÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:rolayÃḊthÃḊ|rolayÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:rolayÃḊjÃḊ|rolayÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:rolayÃḊshÃḊ|rolayÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:rolayÃḊkÃḊ|rolayÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:rolayathatha|rolayathatha]] || [[word:rolayajaja|rolayajaja]] || [[word:rolayashasha|rolayashasha]] || [[word:rolayakaka|rolayakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:rolayatha|rolayatha]] || [[word:rolayaja|rolayaja]] || [[word:rolayasha|rolayasha]] || [[word:rolayaka|rolayaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:rolayafthaf|rolayafthaf]] || [[word:rolayafjaf|rolayafjaf]] || [[word:rolayafshaf|rolayafshaf]] || [[word:rolayafkaf|rolayafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:rolayasha|rolayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolayshÃḋsha|rolayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolayrosha|rolayrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolaymusha|rolaymusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolayasha|rolayasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolaynkshÃḋsha|gorolaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolaynkrosha|gorolaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolaynkmusha|gorolaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolaynkyasha|gorolaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:rolalayasha|rolalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolalayshÃḋsha|rolalayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolalayrosha|rolalayrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolalaymusha|rolalaymusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolalayasha|rolalayasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolalaynkshÃḋsha|gorolalaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolalaynkrosha|gorolalaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolalaynkmusha|gorolalaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolalaynkyasha|gorolalaynkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:relÃḊyasha|relÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:relÃḊyshÃḋsha|relÃḊyshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:relÃḊyrosha|relÃḊyrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:relÃḊymusha|relÃḊymusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:relÃḊyasha|relÃḊyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorelÃḊynkshÃḋsha|gorelÃḊynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorelÃḊynkrosha|gorelÃḊynkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorelÃḊynkmusha|gorelÃḊynkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorelÃḊynkyasha|gorelÃḊynkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:rolfayasha|rolfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:rolfayshÃḋsha|rolfayshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:rolfayrosha|rolfayrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:rolfaymusha|rolfaymusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:rolfayasha|rolfayasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorolfaynkshÃḋsha|gorolfaynkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gorolfaynkrosha|gorolfaynkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorolfaynkmusha|gorolfaynkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gorolfaynkyasha|gorolfaynkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
